Notice Of Cavalry Spv I, Llcs Motion And Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Alisa J. Kim, esq. (510-736-6293) specially appearing for plaintiff's counsel.
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted.

Granted, for reasons set forth in moving papers and the motion is unopposed. Plaintiff's Requests for Admission, Set One, to Defendant Cody J Painter are deemed admitted.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
